mapper.select: SELECT o.*, s.orders_status_name FROM orders o JOIN orders_status s ON o.orders_status_idx = s.orders_status_idx WHERE o.orders_idx = #{orders_idx}
SELECT oi.*, i.item_name, i.item_thumbnail_img FROM orders_item oi JOIN item i ON oi.item_idx = i.item_idx WHERE oi.orders_idx = #{orders_idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('orders_orders_idx_seq')
INSERT INTO orders ( orders_idx, mem_idx, orders_total_price, orders_grade_discount, orders_coupon_discount, orders_status_idx, orders_regdate ) VALUES ( #{orders_idx}, #{mem_idx}, #{orders_total_price}, #{orders_grade_discount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{orders_coupon_discount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, 1, NOW() )

INSERT INTO orders_item ( orders_item_idx, orders_idx, item_idx, orders_item_quantity, orders_price_at ) VALUES ( nextval('orders_item_orders_item_idx_seq'), #{orders_idx}, #{item_idx}, #{orders_item_quantity}, #{orders_price_at} )
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET orders_status_idx = 5 WHERE orders_idx = #{orders_idx}
